subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150827524 is not a GRB
body:
H.-F. Yu reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 462371689/150827524
at 12:34:45.73 UT on the 27 August 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a
particle event."
